items.claim: Chase Hooper is vulnerable to being knocked out if his opponent can keep the fight standing.
items.quote: If Mitch Ramirez can turn it into a kickboxing match, he'll knock Chase Hooper out.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's physical ability to bend his knees is in question.
items.quote: does he even have an ability to bend his knees anymore?

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is currently in his athletic prime.
items.quote: I know Duplexie is in his prime.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett's grappling defense matches up well against Charles Oliveira.
items.quote: I might pick Patty to beat Charles for the simple reason that the grappling defense is going to match up well.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis will defend takedowns more effectively against Kamaru Usman than he did against Khamzat Chimaev.
items.quote: I feel like he's going to defend takedowns better heading into an Uzman fight than the last one.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has the potential to knock out Kamaru Usman on the feet.
items.quote: I think DDP might knock Usman out on the feet.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez tested positive for nandrolone.
items.quote: Levi Rodriguez was on steroids. He tested positive for Nanderlone.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a significant height advantage and a legitimate knockout threat against Austin Bashy.
items.quote: Jose Delgado is at even money with Austin Bashy. He's significantly taller and brings a legitimate knockout threat.
